ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_key" TEXT /* Unique key for the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution status of the issue (e.g., Fixed, Won't Fix, Duplicate) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Username of the person the issue is assigned to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the person who created the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue priority */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue type */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version affected by the issue */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the issue occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES issue_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES issue_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES issue_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES issue_priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Tester, Project Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment is related to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the attached file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attached file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the history entry is related to */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the person who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the change made */,
  "prev_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the issue */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the issue */,
  "prev_resolution" TEXT /* Previous resolution of the issue */,
  "new_resolution" TEXT /* New resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Leader of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the software version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "issue_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first issue */,
  "issue_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second issue */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., Duplicate, Related) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_links_issue_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id_2") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_links_issue_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id_1") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tag_map" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_component" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_component_map" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "component_id")
)
